label: PASS
rationale: CreateRow succeeded and the later Get returns the documented P-521 default values for omitted columns p, r, b, x, and y rather than zero or arbitrary values.

label: FAIL
rationale: The C_EC_521 values section requires omitted p, r, b, x, and y values on a new row to be set to the documented P-521 defaults. The target returns column 3 p as 0 instead of the documented P-521 p value, so it is not compliant.
